summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AIC (Artificial Commercialista) web application. All major features tested successfully including authentication, practice management, AI agent execution, and UI functionality.
passed_tests: Backend API health check
Admin login with admin@aic.it / Admin123!
User registration with consent checkbox
Dashboard stats display (total, pending, processing, completed)
Practice CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
AI Agent execution with GPT-5.2 (analysis, validation, document, communication agents)
Document upload functionality
Activity log tracking all user actions
Notifications system
Login page loads with Italian text (Accedi, Artificial Commercialista)
Dashboard navigation and stats display
Create practice flow with 3 steps (type selection, client data, summary)
Practice types in Italian (Apertura Partita IVA, Chiusura Partita IVA, etc.)
Agents page shows transparent agent information with system prompts
Activity log displays user actions with timestamps
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Logout functionality works correctly
User registration page with consent checkbox
Complete practice creation workflow
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Pratiche, Agenti AI, Log Attività)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor logout UI issue resolved)
